title: Zombie Jerky
description: Turn rotten zombie flesh into purified beef jerky with a smoker!
body:
Zombie Jerky is a simple mod that was requested by a Subscriber of mine. Turn Rotten Flesh into Zombie Jerky in the smoker! This requires Fabric. Not forge compatible.

 

Getting Started:

  • Kill some zombies.
  • Get some rotten flesh
  • Get a Smoker
  • Stick that flesh into a smoker to rid if of it's poison and turn it into jerky!

 

Nothing more than that!

 

Compatibility:

  • Minecraft 1.16.0 to 1.16.4
